caption: A video captures a split-screen layout featuring a spreadsheet on the left and a presenter's video feed on the right. In the presenter's window, a man with short brown hair and a beard wears a black shirt and sits in a dimly lit room. Above him, a red and white logo reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM", and below him, a red call-to-action says, "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" next to a "Subscribe" button. The spreadsheet on the left is initially mostly blank with a few names. Over time, a vertical list of names and regions is populated. By the end of the sequence, the list includes "BRIAN FRANK PACIFIC", "BRIAN FRANK ATLANTIC", "BRIAN FRANK* CENTRAL", "BRIAN FRANK SOUTHWEST", "Kennard Bolt NORTHWEST", and "Kyle Barber SOUTHEAST". The spreadsheet's title bar identifies the document as "Tue, 3/5/22 - 2020-21 Panini Obsidian Basketball FOTL 1of 1 off the Line L".
